summary: Join us for an insightful conversation with Raghav Iyengar, a mutual fund industry veteran with over three decades of experience. As the current CEO of 360 One Asset Management, Raghav shares valuable insights on the evolution of investor behavior from short-term trading to goal-based investing, provides tailored recommendations for beginners, and emphasizes the critical importance of early investing and financial discipline.

seo.title: Mutual Fund Investing Insights I Raghav Iyengar
seo.description: Join us for an insightful conversation with Raghav Iyengar, a mutual fund industry veteran with over three decades of experience. As the current CEO of

takeaways.text: Raghav Iyengar brings over three decades in the mutual fund industry and now leads 360 One Asset Management, so his read on how investors have changed is worth hearing out.
The conversation traces a real shift in investor behavior from short-term trading to goal-based investing, and that mindset is the thread running through the episode.
The discipline is concrete: aim to save at least 30% of your monthly income and build an emergency fund before you reach for anything riskier.
Stick with regulated investment managers and get honest about your own risk profile before you commit money to a fund.
Staying emotionally steady during volatile markets is treated as a practiced skill, not a personality trait, and it matters as much as which fund you pick.
